Legal

Privacy Policy

Last updated: March 2026

Analytics

We use Cloudflare Web Analytics. a privacy-first, cookieless analytics tool. We see aggregate traffic data. We cannot identify individual visitors.

Email

Newsletter subscribers: we store your email only for sending our content. Unsubscribe anytime. We never sell or share email addresses.

Affiliate Disclosure

Some articles contain affiliate links. If you purchase through these links, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. Affiliate relationships never influence our editorial opinions or recommendations.

Cookies

This site does not use tracking cookies. Cloudflare Web Analytics is cookieless by design.

Contact

Questions? Email hello@glowdecoded.com.

G
Glow Decoded

Skincare education, honest reviews, and K-Beauty deep-dives. Everything we recommend, we've tested on our own skin first.
